CHAT: These are phrases for CHAT output
AllPlayersReady: {green}All players are ready, the knife round will start soon
CantTakePauseNow: {green}You cannot take a pause now, it can only be taken after the round starts!
WelcomeLeader: {green}You have been appointed leader! If you win the knife round, you can choose !stay or !switch. You can also change your team name using !changename <newname> (Only in the knife round and first round)
AllPlayersJoin: {green}All players are here, waiting for readiness confirmation, type !ready
CanUseOnlyPlayerInGame: {green}This command can only be used by players participating in the tournament!
NotCorrectName: {green}Invalid team name, use !changename <name>, team name cannot contain spaces!
YouCantChangeNameNow: {green}You cannot change the team name after the first round :(
MessageAboutUnPause: {green}Pause started, if you want to unpause early, type !unpause
HUD: These are phrases for CENTER output (colors are not supported here)
OtherLeaderTakePause: Another leader has already taken a pause
WaitingPlayers: Waiting for all players to connect [{0}/{1}]
